$SHOP (April 22, 2026-daily)



DannyTrades
Apr 22, 2026








View in app

SHOP Analysis:

The bullish red candle on the daily chart from April 15 was shared previously. Last week, positive sentiment extended to the weekly timeframe as SHOP printed another bullish red candle. To resume the medium-term uptrend, SHOP needs a consistent weekly close above $133.32. A weekly close below $109.32 would invalidate the current bullish setup. For now, SHOP remains range-bound between $129 and $137.

Notably, a bullish red ribbon is now unfolding on the daily chart, signaling a potential mid-term uptrend — provided whale accumulation remains strong and steady (currently at 53.1%). Current support levels are at $118 and $129, while resistance sits at $137 and $145.

Closing price: $131.13

Current support levels:$118, $129

Resistance levels: $137, $145

Whale Accumulation: decreased to 53.1%

Technical Indicators:

MACD is curling up while RSI is flattening.
